description_long: This is a cylindrical beverage can with a matte black background and dynamic, stylized graphics featuring white and blue splash motifs. The front displays bold, angular text reading 'YOLO Drink' in white with a metallic effect, surrounded by energetic, swirling patterns. The can's top is metallic silver with a standard pull-tab opening, typical of soft drink or energy drink cans. On one side, a small '20cl' volume marking is visible, indicating the can's capacity. The rear side features a detailed nutritional information panel in white text on a dark background, along with additional branding and product details. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments and appealing to a youthful demographic.
description: A black cylindrical can labeled 'YOLO Drink' with bold white and blue splash graphics, metallic top, and a visible nutrition facts panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'YOLO Drink' logo in bold white text with dynamic splash graphics.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue and white splash design and the '20cl' volume marking near the base.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing more of the splash graphics and the edge of the nutritional label.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the full nutritional information panel and additional branding details.
attribute_brand_logo: The front features a stylized 'YOLO Drink' logo in bold, angular white text with a metallic effect, located centrally on the can.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel is visible on the back of the can, listing calories and other nutritional information.
